What's Become of the Baby? pl
What's Become of the Baby? pl
Set list compiled by Rob Scalcione
Because the Phans want to know!
"Recorded with Panasonic HM TA1 digital video camera in shirt pocket about 20’ away
slightly left of center stage. The TA1 can only record 30 minutes at a time maximum and my batteries last about 1 hour and 15 minutes
so there are three cuts in this
continuous performance. MP4 files were converted to FLAC files using WinAmp. That’s just about it." Then those FLACs arrive on a cd

and were adjusted in Soundforge and Adobe Audition to clean up the cuts and add some significant equalization. The show was tracked into 18 cuts of approximately 5 minutes each using CD Wave. Checksums were made in TLC. That is all... Oh
this arrived as a mono recording and is now two tracks of the same...
